summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Creator Hub features (Option B). All 27 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all 4 tabs working. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in create_profile. Fixed ESLint error in DiscoveryDashboard.jsx. No regressions on existing pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in creator_service.py create_profile method - was returning profile dict with _id which is not JSON serializable
Fixed ESLint error in DiscoveryDashboard.jsx - renamed usePreset to applyPreset (function name looked like React hook)
AI Recommendations using Emergent LLM (GPT-5.1) working correctly - returns personalized recommendations with match scores
Revenue Analytics charts (Recharts LineChart/BarChart) rendering correctly with demo transaction data
test_credentials: No credentials needed - creator APIs use demo_user by default
seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded via POST /api/creator/seed-demo-data - 5 AI tools and 5 transactions created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Creator Hub (Option B) fully tested: (1) Backend: All 27 API tests pass - creator profile CRUD, portfolio management, marketplace search with filters, AI recommendations, revenue analytics. (2) Frontend: Creator Hub at /creator-hub with 4 tabs (Portfolio, Marketplace, AI Picks, Revenue) all functional. Portfolio shows profile info and allows adding/deleting items. Marketplace shows trending tools with search and filters. AI Picks shows personalized recommendations from Emergent LLM. Revenue shows charts and metrics. (3) Fixes applied: MongoDB ObjectId serialization in create_profile, ESLint usePreset naming. (4) No regressions: Setup page, Dashboard, Maintenance page all working correctly.

backend_api_tests.creator_status: PASS - Returns active status with all features available
backend_api_tests.get_profile: PASS - Returns profile or empty structure
backend_api_tests.add_portfolio_item: PASS - Adds item with generated ID

frontend_ui_tests.portfolio_tab: PASS - Shows profile info and portfolio items
frontend_ui_tests.add_portfolio_item: PASS - Form opens and submits correctly
frontend_ui_tests.marketplace_tab: PASS - Shows trending tools and search

regression_tests.maintenance_page: PASS - O&M Dashboard with health status

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not JSON serializable in create_profile response
bugs_fixed.fix: Added profile.pop('_id', None) before returning profile dict

bugs_fixed.issue: ESLint error: React Hook 'usePreset' cannot be called inside a callback
bugs_fixed.fix: Renamed function from usePreset to applyPreset
